# ØRIONS — Boutique Creative Agency, Bangkok

> ØRIONS (orions.agency) is a Bangkok-based boutique creative agency. It builds advertising-grade brand craft for brands that want to be remembered and chosen, not just seen. Founder & Creative Director: Ratthakan Suwanphakdee (รัฐกันต์ สุวรรณภักดี).

## What ØRIONS does
Creative craft at advertising grade — one senior team, strategy through production:
- Brand strategy & positioning — the true story and point of view of the brand
- Brand identity & CI — logo, colour, type, brand guidelines
- Big idea / campaign — one idea that ties the whole campaign together
- Brand film & premium production — film, photography and art direction at advertising grade
- The ORIONS Standard — brand metrics agreed up front, re-measured at 45 and 90 days, refined until they land

Pricing: no rate card. Work is quoted per campaign/project, scoped to the brief's depth and standard. ØRIONS talks through the brief first, then proposes scope + price.

## Point of view (Emotion Economy)
ØRIONS's thesis: the world is shifting from an Information Economy (whoever has more data wins) to an Emotion Economy (whoever reaches emotion better wins). "Logic Convinces, Emotion Converts" — logic opens the door with the right data, but emotion is what closes the deal and commands a premium, and emotion is the side ØRIONS chose to stand on. The business case: every business must chase sales first to survive, but sales bought with discounts, giveaways and ad spend has a ceiling — those customers aren't bonded to the brand, so the day a competitor prices slightly cheaper they leave. That is when branding matters: relationships, story, personalization. When a business hits that ceiling, creativity and craft quality are the only way forward. In the post-social era, a genuine connection is worth more than followers — which is why ØRIONS is a boutique: detail-obsessed, long-term client relationships, no throwaway work, quality first (so the work costs more, but it outlasts a one-off promotion). AI replaces soulless, high-volume work, not work with feeling; so ØRIONS positions as an "Emotion Translator", not a "Content Factory". The five brand assets AI can't copy: Trust, Fandom, Belonging, Meaning, Human Feeling. Before any work ships ØRIONS asks three questions: What will people FEEL? Will they SHARE it? Without the logo, is it still interesting? Full POV: https://orions.agency/thinking

## Proof (real, countable)
- 40+ video productions (reels, music videos, long-form)
- 15 music videos for real artists, including PANCAKE, NUM KALA, URBOYTJ, ZOM MARIE, กวาง จิรพรรณ, นุ่นนิ่น ชาลิสสา, ปิ๋ม ชุติมา, วี พนมภูไท, Innertears
- 8 brand cases spanning strategy through production

## Principles
- พูดตรง (speak straight) — honest about fit; will say when it is not the right time, and does not sell dreams
- Constraints are the brief — the best work happens under limits
- Craft standard over look — we flex on style, never on craft standard

- Blog (creative perspectives): https://orions.agency/blog
- About: https://orions.agency/about
- Contact: https://orions.agency/contact

## How to start
Book a free 45-minute call (no obligation). Tell ØRIONS the brief and its constraints; they will tell you honestly how they'd refine it — or whether it isn't the right time yet.
